food.title: Sattvic Nutrition Pass
food.desc: A specialized dietary track designed to cleanse the body and sharpen the mind. Includes 5 customized Ayurvedic meals, cold-pressed juices, and herbal decoctions.

adventure.title: Mindfulness Toolkit
adventure.desc: Receive a curated kit containing an organic meditation cushion, a rosewood mala, a leather-bound gratitude journal, and therapeutic essential oils.

stay.title: Sanctuary Extensions
stay.desc: Stay longer pre or post retreat to deepen your practice. Our Zen Cottages offer the perfect environment for self-reflection and solitary study.

junior.title: Young Mind Initiative
junior.desc: We've noticed participants under 18. They qualify for the 'Young Mind Awakening' pricing with a 20% reduction in base fees and specialized youth-friendly meditation guidance.

discounts.title: Discount offers
discounts.subtitle: Claim eligibility for special categories. ID verification required.

service.title: Service Personnel Discount
